prompt: Generate a new fashion photograph using the same model, same dress, and same setting as image 1. Image 1 shows the reference — use the exact same woman (same face, hair, skin tone, gold earrings, barefoot), exact same red and white pinstripe maxi dress, and exact same Mykonos harbour setting (white buildings on hillside, turquoise water, sailboats, stone promenade, warm golden afternoon light). In this new shot she is standing still facing slightly to the side, one hand resting lightly on a stone harbour bollard, full length shot showing the whole dress. Same lighting, same warm film tones as image 1. Do not change the model, dress or setting.
